# LeGoodAnfitrion

> AI-powered event hosting platform for managing guests, sending RSVP invitations, and planning menus — all from one place.

LeGoodAnfitrion is a SaaS web application that helps hosts organize private events (dinners, parties, celebrations) with smart guest management and AI-assisted planning. Available in 5 languages: Spanish, English, Catalan, French, and Italian.

## Core Features

- **Event Management:** Create events with date, time, location, checklists, and custom settings. Track event phases from planning to completion.
- **Smart Guest Profiles:** Store guest preferences, dietary restrictions (vegan, vegetarian, gluten-free, lactose-free), allergies, and contact details. A Global Guest Profile follows the guest across events so they never repeat their info.
- **RSVP Invitations:** Generate personalized invitation links. Share via WhatsApp or email. Track responses (attending / maybe / not attending) in real time.
- **Share Cards:** Auto-generate beautiful invitation images optimized for sharing on WhatsApp and social media.
- **AI Menu Planner:** Based on confirmed guests and their dietary needs, AI suggests a full menu, shopping list, ambience ideas, and timing schedule — adapted to restrictions automatically.
- **Expense Splitter:** Calculate per-person costs and generate ready-to-send Bizum/WhatsApp payment messages.
- **Icebreaker Mode:** AI generates conversation starters, a bad joke, and a 5-minute party game to rescue awkward silences.
- **Smart Hosting Suggestions:** AI analyzes guest data and event context to recommend seating, music, and activity ideas.

## How It Works

1. Host creates an event and adds guests.
2. RSVP invitations are sent via personalized links.
3. Guests confirm attendance and optionally share dietary needs.
4. AI generates a tailored menu and shopping list based on confirmed guests.
5. Host manages everything from a single dashboard.

## Target Audience

- People who host dinners, birthday parties, and social gatherings.
- Hosts who want to avoid the hassle of collecting RSVPs via scattered WhatsApp messages.
- Anyone who needs to plan menus around dietary restrictions and allergies.
- Event organizers looking for a simple, elegant all-in-one tool.

## Pricing

Currently free during open beta. All features (events, guests, RSVP, AI planning) are included at no cost.

## Technology

Built with React, TailwindCSS, and Supabase. AI features powered by large language models. Multilingual support (ES, EN, CA, FR, IT) with full i18n.
